testcase.name: test_root_endpoint
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_snaproad_mobile_api.py:38: in test_root_endpoint data = response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_challenges_have_correct_structure

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing field in challenge: gems_reward assert 'gems_reward' in {'claimed': False, 'completed': False, 'description': 'Complete 10 trips this week', 'expires': '3 days', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_snaproad_mobile_api.py:334: in test_challenges_have_correct_structure assert field in challenge, f"Missing field in challenge: {field}" E AssertionError: Missing field in challenge: gems_reward E assert 'gems_reward' in {'claimed': False, 'completed': False, 'description': 'Complete 10 trips this week', 'expires': '3 days', ...}

testcase.name: test_create_report

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'id' in {'badges_earned': [1], 'report': {'created_at': '2026-02-16T14:38:17.913572', 'description': 'Large pothole in right lane', 'expires_at': '2026-02-17T02:38:17.913579', 'id': 1, ...}, 'xp_result': {'level_change': 0, 'leveled_down': False, 'leveled_up': False, 'new_level': 1, ...}}

testcase.name: test_report_types_valid
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_snaproad_mobile_api.py:527: in test_report_types_valid report_id = response.json()["data"]["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'id'

testcase.name: test_get_community_badges

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'total' in {'data': [{'desc': 'Post your first road report', 'earned': False, 'icon': '#x1F4CD', 'id': 1, ...}, {'desc': 'Get 10 upvotes on reports', 'earned': False, 'icon': '#x1F44D', 'id': 2, ...}, {'desc': 'Post 10 road reports', 'earned': False, 'icon': '#x1F6E1️', 'id': 3, ...}, {'desc': 'Get 50 upvotes total', 'earned': False, 'icon': '#x1F9B8', 'id': 4, ...}, {'desc': 'Report 5 hazards', 'earned': False, 'icon': '⚠️', 'id': 5, ...}, {'desc': 'Report 5 accidents', 'earned': False, 'icon': '#x1F697', 'id': 6, ...}, ...], 'earned_count': 0, 'success': True, 'total_count': 20}

testcase.name: test_get_driving_score

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'categories' in {'last_updated': '2026-02-16T14:38:18.776459', 'metrics': [{'description': 'Staying within speed limits', 'id': 'speed', 'name': 'Speed Compliance', 'score': 100, ...}, {'description': 'Gradual, safe braking', 'id': 'braking', 'name': 'Smooth Braking', 'score': 91, ...}, {'description': 'Gradual speed increases', 'id': 'acceleration', 'name': 'Smooth Acceleration', 'score': 100, ...}, {'description': 'Safe distance from other cars', 'id': 'following', 'name': 'Following Distance', 'score': 100, ...}, {'description': 'Signaling before turns', 'id': 'turns', 'name': 'Turn Signals', 'score': 100, ...}, {'description': 'Minimal phone distractions', 'id': 'focus', 'name': 'Focus Time', 'score': 94, ...}], 'orion_tips': [{'id': '1', 'metric': 'braking', 'priority': 'high', 'tip': 'Start braking a bit earlier. This gives you more control and is easier on your passengers!'}, {'id': '2', 'metric': 'focus', 'priority': 'medium', 'tip': 'Mount your phone for hands-free navigation. Staying focused is key to safe driving!'}, {'id': '3', 'metric': 'speed', 'priority': 'low', 'tip': 'Try using cruise control on highways to maintain consistent speeds.'}], 'overall_score': 97}
